SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-04-2008 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUGHES, TIMBERLY JAY'S DELI, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EXACT RETAIL SYSTEMS, LLC $2,875.80 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,925.80, (1.) PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS AMENDED TO ADD DEFENDANT EXACT RETAIL SYSTEMS LLC; EXACT RETAIL SYSTEMS LLC WAIVES SERVICE AND NOTICE OF TRIAL, AND APPEARS BY TOM SAGI. 2.) DEFENDANT CARD SERVICE INTERNATIONAL DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS IMPROPERLY NAMED PARTY. 3.) THE JUDGMENT MAY BE SATISFIED BY DEFENDANT VOIDING ITS OUTSTANDING INVOICE IN THE AMOUNT OF $2875.80.)
